subject: A winged dragon-like creature, likely an Eternal, plummets out of a green forest canopy after being ensnared by sudden plant growth — vines and branches snare its wings as it crashes toward the ground.
description: A skeletal, blue-tinged winged creature with bat-like wings and a draconic silhouette is caught mid-fall, tumbling head-down through a tangle of green foliage. Vines and rapidly grown plant matter wrap around its body and wings, dragging it out of the sky. The background is a vertical wall of dense forest canopy in deep emerald and viridian tones, with shafts of soft sunlight breaking through the leaves above. The composition reads as a dynamic action snapshot — gravity in motion, the moment a flying threat is brought low by druidic magic.
foreground: Falling winged creature ensnared by vines
background: Dense vertical forest canopy with sunlight filtering through leaves
